title: passiflora hassleriana var. paraguariensis
intro: Passiflora hassleriana var. paraguariensis is a variety of the Passiflora genus, commonly known as a type of passionflower. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its sedative and anxiolytic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Passiflora hassleriana var. paraguariensis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often recommended for individuals seeking natural remedies for anxiety and sleep disorders.
